FLOW CAP

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.24.0″ _module_preset=”default” custom_margin=”||14px|||” global_colors_info=”{}”]

A comfortable and stylish snap-back cap with an embroidered Flow logo.

 

  • COLOUR:  Black with blue pattern
  • SIZE:            One size fits all
  • STYLE:        Snapback with embroidered Flow logo

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]
